response.original_title: メルカリPresents NEO GLOBAL TAG LEAGUE 2026
response.overview: Neo Global Tag League 2026 ~ Day 3 was a professional wrestling event promoted by Pro Wrestling NOAH, held on May 26, 2026, at Light Cube Utsunomiya in Utsunomiya, Tochigi, Japan. It served as the third show for the promotion's round-robin tag team tournament.
response.title: メルカリPresents NEO GLOBAL TAG LEAGUE 2026
